title: youngia tenuifolia subsp. diversifolia
intro: Youngia tenuifolia subsp. diversifolia, also known as Korean crown daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive problems. Youngia tenuifolia subsp. diversifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
